programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: Action-comedy with Dwayne Johnson and Kevin Hart. Two former school buddies team up to thwart a terrorist plot. But things may not be as they seem. With Amy Ryan and Jason Bateman.

programme.title: New: Piers Morgan: Uncensored
programme.desc: The bold, opinion-led news and debate show hosted by Piers Morgan. Piers blends journalism, debates and cultural commentary that's unapologetically direct.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How do they turn seaweed into sushi wrapping? How do they make a beer bottle that lasts for fifteen years? How do they keep surfers safe from man-eating sharks? S11/Ep3

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Sapphire hopes to find her ideal woman by stripping back the clothes. Kieron, who's been single for three years, chooses from six women in the Naked Attraction pods.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves returns for the third time as the supposedly retired hitman. Someone's put a contract on John Wick's head and only a mystic in Morocco can lift it.
(2019) Keanu Reeves returns as the 'retired' hitman. John's got a bounty on head. Fight!

programme.title: Help! My House Is Haunted
programme.desc: The team journeys to a country estate in Devon with a dark history, where lingering spirits and a tormented child's ghost sightings have been reported. S1/Ep7

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics rush to help a grandmother with osteoporosis who fell down the stairs carrying her grandson. And an elderly man is found unconscious face down in his hallway. (S2 Ep4/10)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a corrections officer is arrested for sexually assaulting female inmates, the union that supports him set their sights on Barba and the SVU.

programme.title: Skin A&E
programme.desc: Dr Adil and Dr Emma need lightning-fast reflexes to dodge the spray from patients' troublesome cysts and Dr Natalia sees a patient with melasma (S2 Ep 8)

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad
programme.desc: Iraqi soldier Latif Yahia is forced to become Saddam Hussein's son Uday's body double. Trained to mimic him, Latif witnesses Uday's brutality and must choose: death or escape?
Iraqi soldier Latif Yahia is forced to become Uday Hussein's body double.

programme.title: Hot Fuzz
programme.desc: Surreal mystery comedy film starring Simon Pegg and Nick Frost, 2007. A hotshot young London cop is sent to a quiet rural posting but uncovers a seedy hotbed of murderous mayhem.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: A new crew are under threat from crocodiles and accusations of illegal prospecting. The Victoria Diggers receive some welcome help. S5/Ep6

programme.title: Murder On CCTV
programme.desc: Adrianne Robert was found dead by her roommate after a night out. Investigators use security footage to hunt for a calculated killer. S7/Ep9

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's bathing in flavourful finds, including fried rice burritos in California, real deal Jamaican in Vegas and lobster meatballs in Florida. S36/Ep12

programme.title: Those Were the Days
programme.desc: 1983: when two 007s vied for box office supremacy, pop star Boy George made a splash, Diana, Princess of Wales upstaged her husband, Brink's-Mat burglars pulled off their heist; and Shergar was seized.
1983: when Boy George made a splash; Shergar was seized; two Bonds battled for box office.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: ...Countdown: Jimmy Carr, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, as Jon Richardson and Judi Love take on Rob Beckett and Katherine Parkinson. With Spencer Jones.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: An Oregon highway is filmed spattered with a bizarre white goo, filled with writhing snake-like creatures. Residents of Slavic Village in Ohio film massive explosions.

programme.title: Hot Fuzz
programme.desc: Surreal mystery comedy film starring Simon Pegg and Nick Frost, 2007. A hotshot young London cop is sent to a quiet rural posting but uncovers a seedy hotbed of murderous mayhem.

programme.title: Press Preview
programme.desc: Lively debate and discussion with our panel of paper reviewers about the stories making tomorrow morning's newspapers.
